name: _CHATInit@0
notes: multiplayer chat init: reset the edit state, MSGInit + HUD/shell message rings, then load the CHATMAC macro file (0x4ee2a0) into the 12 macro slots — each line is [\recipient\]text[\soundfile], parsed into parallel arrays: destination (0x522940), sound (0x522720 stride 0x29), text (0x522970 stride 0x33)

name: CHATLoadMacros
notes: overlapping alternate entry of CHATInit that reloads only the macro tables (skips the ring re-init)

name: @CHATKey@4
notes: the multiplayer chat key handler (returns 0 if it consumed the key): `` `/~ ``/Alt+Enter open an edit line targeting all/side/wing/squadron (mode 0-4, filtered by CanChat); Tab/Shift+Tab cycle mode; F1-F12 fire a macro (send its text/sound to the mode's recipients); Enter sends the typed line to every matching player via MSGSend(kind 0x24); printable keys append; Esc cancels

name: CanChatMode
notes: is the current chat mode usable now (side/wing require sides chosen; screen 0x10 in-flight vs pre-mission)

name: ChatMyWing
notes: the player's own wing id (for wing-chat targeting), or 0 when not flying

name: ChatCanReach
notes: does chat mode M let this computer reach player P — same-side/same-wing/same-squadron tests over _objControlledBy / _humanChoseSide

name: _CHATGetEditLine@0
notes: format the in-progress edit line ("SEND TO ALL: text_") with a blinking cursor for the HUD overlay

name: _CHATEndMission@0
notes: end-of-mission chat reset: clear editing + re-init the message rings

name: _CHATFixKeyarray@0
notes: while a chat line is being edited, force the flight-control keys in _keyarray to released so typing does not fly the plane (called from KEYEvent)
